findings.title: Minimum Reward-Per-Hour Validation Applied to Gross Instead of Net Amount
findings.description: rewardTokenMinAmounts check uses gross newCampaign.amount before _computeFees deducts protocol fees. Campaigns pass the check but actually distribute below minimum rate.

findings.title: Improper Error Handling of onClaim Callback in _claim Function
findings.description: try/catch around IClaimRecipient.onClaim — invalid return reverts inside try (uncaught), genuine external failures silently swallowed by empty catch. Malicious recipient can DOS batch claims.

findings.title: Multi-step campaign overrides are anchored to the original campaign, making later overrides impossible
findings.description: overrideCampaign validates against original campaignList entry, not the latest campaignOverrides. Second override fails if original start is in the past, even though effective campaign hasn't started.

findings.title: resolveDispute reverts when disputer is blacklisted causing dispute resolution deadlock
findings.description: Push pattern safeTransfer to disputer reverts if disputer is token-blacklisted (e.g. USDC). Governor cannot resolve dispute or revokeTree — system deadlocked.

findings.title: overrideCampaign end timestamp validation uses wrong variable allowing past campaign timestamps
findings.description: End-time check uses _campaign.startTimestamp (original) instead of newCampaign.startTimestamp (new). Allows setting start and end timestamps both in the past.

findings.title: overrideCampaign missing reward rate validation allows bypass of minimum amount restriction
findings.description: Override can change duration without re-checking rewardTokenMinAmounts, allowing dust campaigns that bypass governance-set spam protection.

findings.title: _createCampaign validates minimum rate on gross amount before fee deduction
findings.description: Same root cause as M-01 from a different warden's perspective. rewardTokenMinAmounts check at line 533 uses gross amount, then _computeFees deducts fees at line 535, and net amount is stored at line 538. Campaigns pass check but distribute below minimum.

findings.title: getMerkleRoot returns old tree during dispute period allowing claims at stale rates
findings.description: Returns lastTree.merkleRoot during dispute window. If old tree has inflated rewards, users can front-run correction by claiming at old rates before new tree activates.
